test-method.name: createUser
test-method.description: Validate user is created using POST User API.

exception.message: Cannot parse object because no supported Content-Type was specified in response. Content-Type was 'text/html'.
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Cannot parse object because no supported Content-Type was specified in response. test-method.name: putUser
test-method.description: Validate user update using User PUT API.

exception.message: Method com.scim.test.UserModelTest.putUser() on instance com.scim.test.UserModelTest@5158b42f depends on not successfully finished methods [com.scim.test.UserModelTest.createUser() on instance com.scim.test.UserModelTest@5158b42f]
